CustomField.formula: CASE( TEXT(Update_RAG__c), "Green", IMAGE("/resource/ragstatus/2green.png", "RAG Rating - Green", 26,26), "Amber", IMAGE("/resource/ragstatus/3amber.png", "RAG Rating - Amber", 26,26), "Red", IMAGE("/resource/ragstatus/4red.png", "RAG Rating - Red", 26,26), null )
CustomField.label: RAG Status
